seo.title: PixelFox | Fuse Bead Pattern and Pixel Art Editor
seo.description: PixelFox is an online fuse bead pattern editor for bead artists, pixel art creators, and handmade brands. It supports photo-to-pixel conversion, palette management, 3D preview, color-by-color assembly, and high-resolution pattern export.
seo.keywords: PixelFox,fuse bead pattern,bead pattern editor,pixel art editor,photo to pixel art,bead palette,perler beads pattern,bead design tool

hero.eyebrow: An online pattern workspace for bead creators
hero.title: PixelFox Fuse Bead Pattern and Pixel Art Platform
hero.description: From photo-to-pixel conversion and bead palette management to 3D previews and high-resolution exports, PixelFox helps creators and handmade brands build patterns that are easy to make, share, and reuse.

features.title: Core tools designed for bead creators
features.description: PixelFox brings pixel conversion, real bead palettes, pattern cleanup, 3D preview, and color-by-color assembly into one workspace, reducing repeated exports and manual counting.

photo.title: Smart photo-to-pattern conversion
photo.description: Upload an image, adjust size, trim edges, flip or rotate it, and convert it into a palette-constrained pixel grid.

palette.title: Palette and color management
palette.description: Use built-in bead palettes, track used colors, keep recent colors, replace colors by drag and drop, and remap colors across palettes.

drawing.title: Pixel-level drawing tools
drawing.description: Brush, bucket, magic wand, eyedropper, eraser, and hand tools cover manual drawing, cleanup, and local edits.

preview.title: 3D bead preview
preview.description: Check the bead texture, silhouette, and overall result in 3D before exporting your pattern.

assembly.title: Color-by-color assembly
assembly.description: Generate assembly steps by color, with progress tracking, mirror flip, coordinates, and color-code helpers.

export.title: High-resolution pattern export
export.description: Export PNG patterns with branding, grids, coordinates, color codes, and usage statistics for saving and sharing.

workflow.title: A complete path from photo to finished bead art
workflow.description: The home page follows the real creation flow so new users can quickly understand how PixelFox supports pattern design, palette adjustment, and assembly.
workflow.carouselLabel: PixelFox fuse bead pattern workflow carousel

upload.title: Import a photo or create a canvas
upload.description: Start from a blank canvas or upload a photo as the base for your bead pattern.

convert.title: Set size and target palette
convert.description: Control pattern width, height, trimming, and color merging so the pixel result fits your bead count.

edit.title: Retouch cells and manage colors
edit.description: Use brush, magic wand, and palette tools to refine edges, backgrounds, shadows, and local color differences.

preview.title: Review 3D results and color steps
preview.description: Check the 3D bead effect and make sure every color step is clear before export.

export.title: Generate a high-resolution pattern
export.description: Export a PNG pattern with grids, coordinates, color codes, and usage statistics for printing or sharing.

useCases.title: Make bead patterns easier to create, deliver, and reuse
useCases.description: Whether you create for yourself, prototype handmade products, teach classes, or share with a community, PixelFox organizes tools and exports around the real production flow.

personal.title: Personal bead art
personal.description: Turn portraits, pets, characters, or keepsake photos into makeable patterns with a lower path from idea to finished piece.

brand.title: Handmade brand prototyping
brand.description: Quickly estimate size, colors, and material usage for custom orders, tutorials, and small-batch products.

teaching.title: Teaching and community sharing
teaching.description: Use clear grids, coordinates, and color steps to prepare teaching materials that beginners can follow.

archive.title: Long-term pattern assets
archive.description: Keep a consistent export format and brand information for organizing work, publishing tutorials, and reusing patterns.

faq.title: Key questions about making fuse bead patterns
faq.description: From use cases and photo conversion to pattern export, quickly see whether PixelFox fits your bead creation and delivery workflow.

patterns.question: What kinds of bead patterns is PixelFox good for?
patterns.answer: PixelFox works well for portraits, pets, badges, decor, keychains, wall pieces, and small handmade products. You can start from photo conversion or draw directly on the pixel canvas.

editing.question: Can I keep editing after converting a photo to pixel art?
editing.answer: Yes. After conversion, the pattern opens in the editor canvas, where you can keep refining it with brush, bucket, magic wand, eyedropper, and color replacement tools.

export.question: What information is included in exported patterns?
export.answer: Exports can include a brand header, pixel grid, coordinates, color codes, size, bead count, and color usage statistics, making them useful for printing, archiving, and sharing.

footer.ctaTitle: Ready to turn an idea into a makeable bead pattern?
footer.ctaDescription: Open the editor, create a canvas, upload a photo, and adjust colors to quickly generate a pattern for making and sharing.
footer.brandDescription: PixelFox helps creators turn photos, ideas, and color plans into clear, makeable bead patterns.
footer.tagline: Fuse bead pattern editor, pixel art creation tool, and photo-to-pixel platform.

palette.changeConfirmDescription: {{count}} used colors are not available in {{palette}}. Continuing will clear the pattern.
palette.changeConfirmNote: Only the parts that use colors missing from the new palette will be reset. If that's okay, continue to switch.

remapNotice.title: Brush color adjusted
remapNotice.description: Current brush color is not available in {{palette}}, so it was changed to the closest match, {{to}}.

replaceDialog.title: Replace Color
replaceDialog.description: Choose a swatch from {{palette}}. Selecting one will immediately replace the current used color.

manageDialog.title: Palette Manager
manageDialog.description: Pick and use different color systems and schemes in your artwork.

uploadDialog.title: Upload Photo
uploadDialog.description: Let's turn your photo into pixel art!

preview3d.description: Rotate, zoom and inspect your pattern in 3D.

assembly.title: Assembly
assembly.description: Follow the pattern color by color.
assembly.showColorCodeHint: Show the active color code on the current step

exportDialog.title: Export Pattern
exportDialog.description: Adjust export options and download your current pattern.
exportDialog.autoCropHint: Trim empty margins around the pattern
exportDialog.mirrorFlipHint: Best for beading from the back
exportDialog.previewHint: Scroll to zoom, drag to pan; on mobile pinch to zoom, two-finger drag to pan
